title: Master plan — minors 4.0–4.6 (five-track matrix)
summary: **Codebase risks (explicit):** [`salesnavigator-codebase-analysis.md`](../codebases/salesnavigator-codebase-analysis.md) — scoped tenant API key model, **distributed rate limit**, **chunk-level idempotency token** — must close or waive before `4.x` scale-up.
